patches.find: Gravity Pervades 49% of the Model's Predictions
patches.replace: Gravity Pervades Roughly Half the Model's Predictions
patches.rationale: Replace brittle hardcoded 49% with stable approximation. Fraction is now 34/70=49% but will drift as WINs are added. 'Roughly half' is durable.

patches.find: Gravity appears in two forms across the dome's 67 WINs.
patches.replace: Gravity appears in two forms across the dome's {{TOTAL_WINS}} WINs.
patches.rationale: Replace hardcoded WIN count 67 with template variable for automatic updating.

patches.find: Fourteen WINs make gravity-direct claims: eclipse gravimetry (WIN-011/012/013/014 — Mohe anomaly and mag-gravity coupling), tidal constituents (WIN-045/046/049/050/051 — M2, S2, K1, O1, N2 periods)
patches.replace: Fifteen WINs make gravity-direct claims: eclipse gravimetry (WIN-011/012/013/014 — Mohe anomaly and mag-gravity coupling), eclipse magnetic ensemble (WIN-068 — 39-eclipse statistical analysis of the same gravity-magnetic coupling mechanism), tidal constituents (WIN-045/046/049/050/051 — M2, S2, K1, O1, N2 periods)
patches.rationale: WIN-068 (39-eclipse ensemble) uses same kappa=1.67 nT/uGal gravity-magnetism coupling as WIN-011/012/013/014. Correctly categorized as gravity-direct. Count goes from 14 to 15.

patches.find: Roughly one-third of the 67 WINs make explicit gravity claims; roughly two-thirds depend on gravitational physics to function.
patches.replace: Roughly one-third of the {{TOTAL_WINS}} WINs make explicit gravity claims; roughly two-thirds depend on gravitational physics to function.
patches.rationale: Replace hardcoded 67 with template variable. Fractions remain approximately correct: 15/70~one-fifth for direct alone, but combined 34/70=49% supports 'roughly half' for total gravity dependence.
